page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.20xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 80 dedicated physical cores using Intel Xeon 8163 processors running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The instance is configured with a single thread per core, providing direct, non-hyperthreaded execution.

This instance is equipped with 704.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 8.8 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, it bundles 19198 GB of SSD capacity, making it highly suitable for data-intensive operations. The network interface provides a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps. No GPU accelerators are included in this configuration.

Given the high density of local SSD storage and substantial memory capacity, the ecs.i2ne.20xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring massive local scratch space or high-throughput database operations without the overhead of network-attached storage. The hardware profile is optimized for large-scale databases, big data analytics, and high-I/O storage workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.20xlarge is a high-capacity storage and memory-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 80 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8163 processors operating at 2.5 GHz with a single thread per core. The hardware configuration includes 704.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.8 GB of memory per core, alongside a massive 19198 GB of local SSD storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps. Lacking GPU acceleration, this instance is designed for resource-dense, non-graphical workloads. It is qualitatively cost-effective for applications requiring extensive local storage and high memory capacity, making it highly suitable for large-scale databases, big data processing, and high-I/O transactional workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.20xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 80 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 704 GB of RAM, 19198 GB of local SSD storage, and 25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-I/O database workloads.

tagline: A dedicated eighty-core server featuring over nineteen terabytes of local SSD storage and seven hundred gigabytes of system memory.

704 GB of system memory providing 8.8 GB per core
19198 GB of bundled local SSD storage
Optimized for large-scale databases and high-I/O workloads
